steps.title: Identify What Expansion Requires
steps.content: An expansion affects both regions with moisture; a shift affects only one, leaving the other dry.

steps.title: Find the Rainfall Pattern
steps.content:
The correct answer shows both regions had high rainfall. The others either show no variation, an implausible pattern, or the single wet-and-dry scenario that was the original problem.
This demonstrates that the ITCZ affected both regions simultaneously, supporting the expansion hypothesis.

This is the correct answer.
